title: acaena microphylla
intro: Acaena microphylla, also known as the small-leaf caterpillar-bush, is a small, low-growing shrub native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Acaena microphylla include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Acaena microphylla can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
